business.name: Garcia Carpentry
business.tagline: Precision Woodwork & Custom Carpentry in Dallas, TX

seo.title: Garcia Carpentry | Expert Custom Carpentry in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Trusted Dallas carpentry for custom furniture, trim, decks & more. Free estimates. Call (214) 736-6976.

hero.headline: Custom Carpentry That Transforms Your Home
hero.subheadline: From custom built-ins to outdoor decks, we bring precision and passion to every project in Dallas, TX.

featureSections.title: Maximize Space with Beautiful Built-Ins
featureSections.body: Our custom built-ins are designed to fit your space perfectly, adding both function and beauty. Whether it’s a home library, entertainment center, or window seat, we craft each piece with premium hardwoods and meticulous attention to detail.
featureSections.cardBody: Complete with floating shelves, desk, and hidden storage — designed to maximize a small alcove.

featureSections.title: Decks, Pergolas & More for Dallas Living
featureSections.body: Extend your living space outdoors with a custom deck or pergola. We use weather-resistant materials and expert joinery to create structures that withstand the Texas heat and look stunning year-round.
featureSections.cardBody: A cedar pergola with retractable shade, integrated lighting, and built-in seating for family gatherings.

whyChooseUs.title: Master Craftsmanship
whyChooseUs.description: Every cut, joint, and finish is executed with precision by experienced carpenters who take pride in their work.

whyChooseUs.title: Reliable & Respectful
whyChooseUs.description: We show up on time, keep your home clean, and communicate clearly throughout the project.

whyChooseUs.title: Custom Solutions
whyChooseUs.description: No cookie-cutter designs. We listen to your vision and create one-of-a-kind pieces that fit your lifestyle.

whyChooseUs.title: Free Estimates
whyChooseUs.description: Get a detailed, no-obligation quote before any work begins. We believe in transparent pricing.

testimonials.quote: Garcia Carpentry built custom bookshelves for our living room. The craftsmanship is outstanding — they fit perfectly and look like they’ve always been there.
testimonials.author: Jennifer L.

testimonials.quote: We hired them to build a deck and pergola. The team was professional, the timeline was spot on, and the result is beautiful. Highly recommend.
testimonials.author: Mark R.

testimonials.quote: From the initial consultation to the final walkthrough, everything was seamless. Our new built-in bench and storage are exactly what we wanted.
testimonials.author: Patricia M.

cta.headline: Ready to Bring Your Carpentry Vision to Life?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free consultation and estimate.

servicesPage.intro: From custom furniture to complete home renovations, Garcia Carpentry offers a full range of carpentry services in Dallas, TX. Each project is handled with skill, care, and a commitment to quality.

services.title: Custom Built-Ins & Shelving
services.shortDescription: Beautiful, space-maximizing built-in bookcases, entertainment centers, window seats, and more.
services.longDescription: Transform any room with custom built-ins that blend seamlessly with your architecture. We design and build everything from floor-to-ceiling bookcases to cozy window seats with storage. Using solid hardwoods and premium plywoods, we create pieces that add value and character to your home.
benefits: Fully customized to your style and storage needs

process.title: Consultation & Design
process.description: We meet at your home to discuss your vision, take measurements, and sketch a custom design.

process.title: Material Selection & Fabrication
process.description: We help you choose wood, finish, and hardware, then build your piece in our workshop.

process.title: Installation & Finish
process.description: Our team installs the built-in with precision, ensuring a perfect fit and flawless finish.

faqs.question: How long does a custom built-in project take?
faqs.answer: Most projects take 2-4 weeks from design to installation, depending on complexity.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim and molding?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can match most profiles and stains to blend with your existing millwork.

services.title: Custom Furniture
services.shortDescription: One-of-a-kind tables, desks, bed frames, and more, built to your specifications.
services.longDescription: Bring your dream furniture to life. Whether you need a farmhouse dining table, a minimalist desk, or a custom bed frame, we craft each piece by hand with attention to joinery and finish. We work with a variety of woods, including oak, walnut, maple, and reclaimed lumber.
benefits: Unique pieces you won't find in stores

process.title: Design Consultation
process.description: We discuss your ideas, style preferences, and functional requirements to create a design plan.

process.title: Wood Selection & Milling
process.description: Choose from our curated selection of hardwoods; we mill and prepare the lumber.

process.title: Joinery & Finishing
process.description: We use traditional joinery techniques and apply a durable, beautiful finish.

faqs.question: Do you use reclaimed wood?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can source reclaimed wood for a rustic, sustainable look.

faqs.question: What is the lead time for custom furniture?
faqs.answer: Typically 4-8 weeks, depending on design complexity and wood availability.

services.title: Trim & Molding Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional crown molding, baseboards, wainscoting, and door casings.
services.longDescription: Add elegance and character to your home with expertly installed trim and molding. Our team has experience with all styles, from classic colonial to contemporary. We ensure tight joints, smooth miters, and a seamless finish that elevates any room.

process.title: Measurement & Material Selection
process.description: We measure your rooms and help you choose molding profiles and materials.

process.title: Cutting & Assembly
process.description: Precise cuts and coped joints for a professional look.

process.title: Installation & Touch-Up
process.description: We install, nail, fill gaps, and touch up paint for a flawless finish.

faqs.question: Can you match existing molding profiles?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can match most standard and custom profiles.

faqs.question: Do you paint the trim as well?
faqs.answer: We can prime and paint, or leave it ready for your painter.

services.title: Deck & Pergola Building
services.shortDescription: Custom decks, pergolas, and outdoor structures built to last.
services.longDescription: Create your perfect outdoor oasis with a custom deck or pergola. We design and build structures that complement your home and landscape, using pressure-treated lumber, cedar, or composite materials. Every project is built to local building codes with sturdy framing and beautiful finishes.

process.title: Site Evaluation & Design
process.description: We assess your yard, discuss your needs, and create a 3D design.

process.title: Permitting & Material Prep
process.description: We handle permits and order materials.

process.title: Construction & Cleanup
process.description: Our crew builds your deck or pergola efficiently, leaving your property clean.

faqs.question: Do you build with composite decking?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer Trex and other composite options for low maintenance.

faqs.question: How long does a typical deck take to build?
faqs.answer: Most decks take 1-2 weeks, depending on size and complexity.

about.headline: Crafted with Pride in Dallas, TX
about.mission: Garcia Carpentry is dedicated to providing exceptional craftsmanship and personalized service to homeowners in Dallas. We believe in building relationships as strong as our joinery.
story: Garcia Carpentry was founded by master carpenter Luis Garcia, who started his career as an apprentice in a small shop in Dallas. For over 15 years, he honed his skills in custom furniture, trim work, and home renovations, eventually launching his own business with a simple mission: deliver quality work that exceeds expectations.

Today, Garcia Carpentry serves homeowners across the Dallas metro area, from historic homes in Munger Place to modern builds in Uptown. We take pride in our reputation for reliability, attention to detail, and beautiful results. Every project is a collaboration, and we treat your home with the same respect we would our own.

coreValues.title: Quality First
coreValues.description: We use only the best materials and techniques, ensuring every project stands the test of time.

coreValues.title: Transparency
coreValues.description: Clear communication, honest pricing, and no surprises.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We respect your home, your time, and your vision.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We are lifelong learners, always refining our skills to deliver the finest work.

contact.headline: Let’s Build Something Beautiful Together
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Call or fill out the form for a free estimate.
